LanguageData.FB_HemoghoulReanimation.label: hemoghoul reanimation
LanguageData.FB_HemoghoulReanimation.description: Teach the colony brain to implant a fingerspike into a human corpse and raise it as a tireless hemoghoul worker.
LanguageData.FB_HemoghoulReanimation.generalRules.rul: subject_story->raised tireless workers through fingerspike implantation
subject_story->bound dead flesh into hemogel-fed laborers
LanguageData.FB_FleshResurrection.label: flesh resurrection
LanguageData.FB_FleshResurrection.description: Teach the colony brain to restore a dead human through fingerspike implantation and bind the revived pawn to the flesh colony.
LanguageData.FB_FleshResurrection.generalRules.rulesS: subject_story->restored dead minds through living flesh
subject_story->used fingerspikes to return corpses to the colony
